race.comment: BEREZKA (2) has placed four of six over this six-furlong journey, gets 2kg off with the claim and draws favourably in gate three. Plenty to like about her prospects. CLIMACTIC (3) is back from a lengthy spell but the form he showed when last in work was good enough for a race like this. Include from the inside marble. MR BUBBALUSKI (4) strips fitter third-up from the spell and may earn some minor money. QUICKZOU (10) scored over 1200m at Eagle Farm two back then missed the frame last time out over 1350m at this track. Great chance to atone. IMMEDIATE (12) finished in the money last time out over 1110m at this track to add to a fine overall record. Can give this a shake.
